title: Damnamenia vernicosa
taxonomy: Damnamenia vernicosa is a genus within the family of flowering plants known as Gentianaceae. This plant is native to Borneo and is classified in the kingdom Plantae. The classification of Damnamenia vernicosa is further broken down into its species and its place in the plant taxonomy. The plant's classification is primarily based on its morphological characteristics and genetic makeup. The specific classification of Damnamenia vernicosa is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, order Gentianales, family Gentianaceae, genus Damnamenia, species D. vernicosa.
